locations_inspected.name: Lone Star Property Holdings, LP
findings: Fire protection system type: Dry Pipe
6 control valves inspected; all found in open position
Water flow alarm tested and operational
Sprinkler heads visual condition: Fair; minor corrosion observed
Spare sprinkler heads in cabinet: Yes; adequate supply
deficiencies: Combustible storage within 18 inches of sprinkler deflectors
Exposed wiring and missing junction box covers in main electrical room

recommendations.description: Remove or relocate combustible storage to maintain at least 18 inches of clearance below sprinkler deflectors.
Correct exposed wiring and install missing junction box covers in the main electrical room.
Connect all tamper switches to ensure complete supervisory monitoring of control valves.

overall_assessment.summary: Dry pipe sprinkler system inspected and passed overall, with adequate water supply and operational alarm devices. Risk grade is Below Average due to noted deficiencies including sprinkler clearance, electrical room issues, and incomplete tamper switch connections.
